product.name: Portable LED Lamp
selling_points: Soft, warm light for desk, bedside, or travel use.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Harsh, bulky lighting or desk lamps take up space and don’t travel well. People want a gentle, warm light they can place anywhere without clutter.
creative_strategy.promise: A compact portable LED lamp that’s easy to carry and delivers soft, warm light for desk, bedside, or travel.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Premium product-hero best elevates a small, design-led electronic like a portable lamp. A restrained tabletop studio, controlled light, and negative space make the lamp feel refined while a single hand action shows scale and portability. A simple warm glow reveal underscores the softness claim without complex mechanics or UI.

candidate_categories.reason: Design-led product benefits from quiet elegance, controlled lighting, and a hero hold. Minimal action and a subtle warm light reveal signal quality and desirability.
candidate_categories.risk: Making the light-on moment obvious enough without overexposing the scene; subtlety can read as too static if not timed well.

candidate_categories.reason: A clear, single action—turning the lamp on to cast a warm light pool—directly proves the claim.
candidate_categories.risk: Can feel utilitarian rather than premium if the set is not refined; requires the light change to be visibly large and warm.

candidate_categories.reason: Close material and form inspection can show compactness and surface quality.
candidate_categories.risk: Too static for 6 seconds and doesn’t easily convey the warm ambience unless the lamp actually turns on, which edges into demo.

creative_design.selling_angle: Design-grade portable lamp you can lift with one hand and enjoy a soft, warm glow anywhere.
creative_design.visual_grammar: premium product-hero tabletop, negative space, controlled commercial lighting, slow hand interaction, gentle camera push-in, warm glow reveal, composed final hold
creative_design.proof_mechanism: A single hand lifts to show compact scale, then a gentle touch activates a visible warm light pool on the matte surface—an immediate, simple proof of softness.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: The lamp sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist studio, switched off, with subtle rim highlights.
creative_design.action_arc: From a still hero frame, a single hand enters, lifts the lamp briefly to show how compact it is, rotates it slightly, sets it back, then gently taps the top; the lamp turns on, casting a soft warm pool of light as the camera slowly pushes in.
creative_design.payoff: A steady premium hold on the glowing lamp with a calm warm halo on the tabletop and background, the hand withdrawn.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: No tiny button close-ups; the hand’s touch implies activation. One surface, one background, no extra props. Matte stone reduces reflections. The light-on event is a single, obvious warm glow that expands on the tabletop—simple and feasible in one take.

character.appearance: Only one adult hand appears; neatly groomed nails; neutral skin tone; no jewelry.
character.wardrobe: Long-sleeve black top with a clean cuff; sleeve edge may enter frame with the hand.
character.performance_style: Slow, precise, minimal movement with gentle, premium handling.

scene.lighting: Soft diffused key from above-left with a subtle rim; low ambient to let the lamp’s warm glow read clearly once activated.
scene.background: Deep charcoal, smooth studio backdrop with clean negative space.

product.visual_identity: The exact portable LED lamp from the reference image: compact, carry-friendly, clean silhouette, neutral finish, minimal detailing; presented powered off at start, then glowing warmly on activation.
product.proof_prop: Matte dark stone tabletop that cleanly shows the lamp’s warm light pool.

single_shot.visual_prompt: Begin from the same scene: a compact portable LED lamp, exactly as in the reference, sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist commercial studio. The background is a softly lit deep charcoal wall; the lamp is switched off and softly rim-lit. The camera holds steady, then starts a very gentle push-in. A single adult hand with a black long sleeve enters from the right edge, delicately gripping the sides of the lamp. The hand lifts the lamp a few centimeters to show its compact size, rotates it slightly to reveal its simple form, and places it back in the original centered spot on the stone. With a light, deliberate touch on the top, the lamp turns on smoothly; a soft, warm amber glow blooms and casts a gentle light pool across the matte stone and a faint warm gradient onto the charcoal background. The hand withdraws out of frame as the camera continues its slow push-in, ending on a composed premium hold of the glowing lamp.
single_shot.start_frame_prompt: Transform the actual product from the provided reference image into a premium tabletop scene. The exact portable LED lamp from the reference sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist commercial studio. The background is a deep charcoal, softly lit backdrop with clean negative space. The lamp is powered off in this first frame, showing subtle rim highlights and a calm, refined look. No hand or person is visible in the first frame. Maintain a stable, straight-on tabletop composition with gentle, controlled studio lighting.
single_shot.audio: Calm, minimal ambient bed; subtle hand movement whoosh; a soft chime as the lamp turns on; no voiceover.
